title: Google's FREE AI Career Hub!
description:
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/

Indian students and tech professionals, pay attention! Google just launched Google Skills—a massive, all-in-one platform for mastering AI and Tech, and most of it is FREE! It combines nearly 3,000 courses, labs, and credentials from Google Cloud, DeepMind, and Grow with Google.
